title: Battlefield™ 6
description:
Fight the fog of war in Season 2. Play now.

The war with Pax Armata crosses the globe and infiltrates the mountainsides of Germany in a grueling assault to reclaim a once owned NATO airbase. Season 2 will be released in 3 parts: Extreme Measures, Nightfall, and Hunter/ Prey, featuring high-intensity maps, critical gadgets, iconic new hardware, and vehicles for waging the ultimate all-out war experience.

This game includes optional in-game purchases of virtual currency that can be used to acquire virtual in-game items.
